stories.title: .143, .170, .194 ... How bad can these 7 MLB regul...
stories.summary: Several elite defensive players are struggling big-time at the plate in 2026. Here's what history says about their ability to stick in the lineup and what options their teams have.

stories.title: Inside Javier Baez's unforgettable chaotic baserun...
stories.summary: When he was with the Cubs, Baez pulled off a magic trick that made the Pirates look like Little Leaguers.

stories.title: Packers' Jacobs out of jail; investigation ongoing...
stories.summary: Packers running back Josh Jacobs has been released from jail Wednesday amid an ongoing investigation following his arrest on several domestic violence charges.

stories.title: Bipartisan college sports bill proposes salary cap...
stories.summary: A group of U.S. senators introduced a bipartisan college sports bill that aims to regulate payments to players, limit transfers and restrict coach movement during the season.

stories.title: FIFA subpoenaed over World Cup ticket practices
stories.summary: New York and New Jersey have subpoenaed FIFA as part of an investigation into its ticketing prices for the 2026 World Cup, citing soaring ticket prices and reports that fans were misled about seat locations.
